allowed_use: Show that frontier accelerator supply depends on specialized lithography/fab equipment upstream of the visible GPU.
blocked_use: Do not infer machine price, customer allocation, wafer output, node eligibility, delivery schedule, export status, or AI-chip volume from tool images.
required_evidence_before_final: ASML/TSMC official source, date, image provenance, and separate evidence for any quantity or export claim.

allowed_use: Explain heterogeneous integration, interposers, chiplets, and memory proximity as mechanisms relevant to LLM accelerators.
blocked_use: Do not claim exact CoWoS capacity, shortage severity, yield, customer allocation, package price, or delivery bottleneck unless directly sourced.
required_evidence_before_final: TSMC/filing/credible reporting with matching date and same metric.

allowed_use: Show HBM as stacked memory used in AI accelerator design.
blocked_use: Do not rank suppliers, assert design wins, quantify shortages, state qualification status, or infer downstream GPU availability from product pages.
required_evidence_before_final: Supplier docs plus customer/platform confirmation or credible independent reporting.

allowed_use: Show that AI accelerators are packaged systems requiring substrates, interconnect, and assembly.
blocked_use: Do not infer supplier exposure, capacity, shortage, customer contracts, or economic upside from a substrate/package image.
required_evidence_before_final: Company filings, capacity statements, or credible reporting tied to the named supplier and period.

allowed_use: Use export controls only where they explain compute access, China hardware constraints, or chip/tool availability relevant to LLM development.
blocked_use: Do not make legal advice, effectiveness claims, smuggling prevalence claims, or national capability claims from policy summaries alone.
required_evidence_before_final: Official rule text plus GAO/credible reporting and date-bounded interpretation.

allowed_use: Use semiconductor texture to explain LLM compute supply, not to become a general semiconductor history.
blocked_use: Do not add broad semiconductor geopolitics, consumer electronics, automotive chips, or fab economics unless they directly affect LLM scaling.
required_evidence_before_final: Chapter placement note that names the LLM constraint served by the visual.
